description: P5 rank-bench query set. The committed set below is the CI-safe SYNTHETIC fixture: it labels relevance against the small deterministic corpus that `crates/cli/examples/rank_bench.rs --fixture` builds in-memory (source_ids listed under each query's `relevant`). Relevance rule: a hit is relevant iff its `source_id` is in `relevant.source_ids` OR its `chunk_id` is in `relevant.chunk_ids`. For a REAL run, the maintainer replaces `queries` with ~50 hand-curated queries labeled against their own corpus (see regenerate.sh) and runs `rank_bench --corpus <lance_dir> --model <id>`.

queries.query: cache control header for the reviewed url
